title: Bridge Essay: Visual mental imagery: Inside the mind's eyes.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through Visual, mental, imagery:, Inside, the.

**Visual mental imagery: Inside the mind'seyes.** — Handb Clin Neurol. PMID: 35964968. DOI: 10.1016/B978-0-12-823493-8.00010-9. What are mental images needed for? Avariety of everyday situations calls for us to plan ahead; one of the clever ways our mind prepares and strategizes our next move is through mental simulation. Apowerful tool in running these simulations is visual mental imagery, which can be conceived as away to activate and maintain an internal representation of the to-be-imagined object, giving rise to predictions.
